args: mkdir -p /etc/mcp-config && echo '{"mcpServers":{}}' > /etc/mcp-config/mcp-config.json && cp /etc/mcp-config/mcp-config.json /home/claude/.claude.json && chown claude:claude /home/claude/.claude.json && echo 'Platform fixups applied'
cd /workspace/repo && git fetch origin master && git reset --hard origin/master

cd /workspace/repo && bazel --output_base=/mnt/bazel-cache/output_base --output_user_root=/mnt/bazel-cache/output_user_root version && KEYTOOL=$(find /mnt/bazel-cache/output_user_root -name keytool -path '*/bin/keytool' -type f 2>/dev/null | head -1) && CACERTS=$(find /mnt/bazel-cache/output_user_root -name cacerts -path '*/lib/security/cacerts' -type f 2>/dev/null | head -1) && echo "Found keytool=$KEYTOOL cacerts=$CACERTS" && cp $CACERTS /tmp/bazel-cacerts && if [ -n "$KEYTOOL" ] && [ -f /tmp/bazel-cacerts ] && [ -f /usr/local/share/ca-certificates/auth-proxy.crt ]; then $KEYTOOL -importcert -noprompt -trustcacerts -alias auth-proxy -file /usr/local/share/ca-certificates/auth-proxy.crt -keystore /tmp/bazel-cacerts -storepass changeit && echo 'Imported proxy CA into copied keystore'; fi && bazel --host_jvm_args=-Djavax.net.ssl.trustStore=/tmp/bazel-cacerts --host_jvm_args=-Djavax.net.ssl.trustStorePassword=changeit --output_base=/mnt/bazel-cache/output_base --output_user_root=/mnt/bazel-cache/output_user_root fetch --repository_cache=/mnt/bazel-cache/repository_cache //python_scio/ci/...

cd /workspace/repo && KEYTOOL=$(find /mnt/bazel-cache/output_user_root -name keytool -path '*/bin/keytool' -type f 2>/dev/null | head -1) && CACERTS=$(find /mnt/bazel-cache/output_user_root -name cacerts -path '*/lib/security/cacerts' -type f 2>/dev/null | head -1) && cp $CACERTS /tmp/bazel-cacerts && if [ -n "$KEYTOOL" ] && [ -f /tmp/bazel-cacerts ] && [ -f /usr/local/share/ca-certificates/auth-proxy.crt ]; then $KEYTOOL -importcert -noprompt -trustcacerts -alias auth-proxy -file /usr/local/share/ca-certificates/auth-proxy.crt -keystore /tmp/bazel-cacerts -storepass changeit 2>/dev/null; true; fi && bazel --host_jvm_args=-Djavax.net.ssl.trustStore=/tmp/bazel-cacerts --host_jvm_args=-Djavax.net.ssl.trustStorePassword=changeit --output_base=/mnt/bazel-cache/output_base --output_user_root=/mnt/bazel-cache/output_user_root fetch --repository_cache=/mnt/bazel-cache/repository_cache //python_scio/ci/...
